SPLL2 spread-spectrum control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x38
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscrg_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:17] - - - -
[16:12] spll2_ssc_spread rw 0x0 1=0.1% .. 31=3.1%
[11:10] - - - -
[9:4] spll2_ssc_div rw 0x0 fmod=ssclk/(128*ssc_div)
[3] spll2_ssc_dnspread rw 0x0 0=center, 1=down
[2] spll2_ssc_disable rw 0x1 0=spread, 1=bypass
[1] spll2_ssc_resetptr rw 0x1 -
[0] spll2_ssc_reset rw 0x1 -
